message.content: {"items":[{"title":"ALLBUS 1990 (German General Social Survey 1990)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1337","justification":"Nationally representative survey of adults in Germany covering social behaviour and attitudes, political attitudes, social inequality, and exclusion; fielded in 1990 and focused on Germany."},{"title":"ALLBUS 1991 (German General Social Survey 1991)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1338","justification":"Covers political behaviour and attitudes, social structure and inequality, and social exclusion topics for Germany in the early 1990s."},{"title":"ALLBUS 1992 (German General Social Survey 1992)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1339","justification":"Includes modules on political attitudes, social inequality, social behaviour and values in Germany; conducted in 1992, squarely within the requested decade."},{"title":"ALLBUS 1994 (German General Social Survey 1994)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1341","justification":"German survey covering social behaviour, political attitudes, and perceptions of inequality; repeated cross‑section relevant to social exclusion debates in mid‑1990s Germany."},{"title":"ALLBUS 1996 (German General Social Survey 1996)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1343","justification":"Focuses on political behaviour and attitudes, social inequality, and social structure in Germany; core source for studying social exclusion in the 1990s."},{"title":"ALLBUS 1998 (German General Social Survey 1998)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1345","justification":"National survey for Germany including attitudes towards politics, government, social inequality, and exclusion at the end of the 1990s."},{"title":"Politbarometer West 1990","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.7642","justification":"Monthly/regular survey series on political attitudes and behaviour in (West) Germany, including evaluations of government and parties around 1990."},{"title":"Politbarometer Gesamtdeutsch 1991","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.7644","justification":"Post‑unification German Politbarometer focusing on political behaviour, party preferences, and views of the political system in 1991 Germany."},{"title":"German Socio‑Economic Panel (SOEP) – Cross‑National Equivalent File, Germany 1990s (SOEP v30, Germany)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.5684/soep.v30","justification":"Longitudinal microdata for Germany throughout the 1990s including measures of income, employment, social exclusion, and political interest/attitudes relevant to inequality and social behaviour."},{"title":"European Social Survey (ESS) Round 1 – Germany, 2002 (retrospective attitudes with roots in 1990s debates)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12204","justification":"Although fielded just after the 1990s, the Germany sample includes detailed measures of political attitudes, trust in institutions, and perceived social exclusion linked to transformations in the 1990s, and is hosted by GESIS."}]}
